notes: The authoritative Phase 4 base did not contain the earlier Tailwind setup artifacts, so this patch restores the Phase 4 infrastructure slice rather than closing the phase.
TailwindCSS, PostCSS, global CSS, root layout import, theme docs, and the Phase 4 CI validator are now present.
Phase 4 remains open until the workstation refreshes app/pnpm-lock.yaml and records pnpm install/check/build/dev plus professional CI proof.
